task:
# Relay stage 2: Research
Task: fix-hf-gate-hint-clipped
Working directory: /Users/admin/Dev/temp-visual-relay

## Task input
# No-keys setup banner: the HF-gate hint "or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar" is clipped

On first run with **no API keys configured**, the QueuePanel shows the Hugging-Face "gate"
banner pinned at its bottom (the no-keys call-to-action). Its second line — a **"Get a free
token →"** button followed inline by the hint **"or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar"** — is cut
off at the panel's right edge. It renders as **"…Get a free token →  or open Settings ⚙"** with
**"in the top bar" missing** (the gear is at the very edge, the trailing words are gone).

This is the same family of fixed-width clipping bug already fixed for the init card's buttons in
`init-panel-buttons-labels-clipped` — a different element in the **same** `QueuePanel`.

## Problem

The banner only appears in the no-keys state (`ShowHfGate` = key states loaded once **and**
`HF_TOKEN` absent), so it is exactly the screen a first-time / no-keys user sees. The hint is
laid out **horizontally next to the button** in a non-wrapping `TextBlock`, and the button +
spacing + hint together exceed the QueuePanel's fixed width, so the panel's clip cuts the hint.

## Evidence

- **Screenshots** (committed beside this task, captured from a real headless Skia render of
  `MainWindow` at 1440×900 with no keys, `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` redirected to an empty dir so no real
  key file was read):
  - `llm-tasks/fix-hf-gate-hint-clipped/hf-gate-clipped-crop.png` — close-up of the banner; the
    bottom line reads `Get a free token →  or open Settings ⚙` and stops there.
  - `llm-tasks/fix-hf-gate-hint-clipped/first-run-no-keys.png` — the whole app at the real 280 px
    panel width (init card + the clipped gate banner at bottom-left).
- **The clipped element** is the inline hint `TextBlock` in
  `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/QueuePanel.axaml`, inside the
  `IsVisible="{Binding ShowHfGate}"` border:

  ```xml
  <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
    <Button Command="{Binding OpenGetKeyUrlCommand}"
            CommandParameter="https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens"
            Padding="10,4" MinHeight="28"
            Content="Get a free token →"/>
    <TextBlock Text="or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar"
               FontSize="11" Foreground="#8E96A3"
               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>   <!-- ← this is clipped -->
  </StackPanel>
  ```

## Facts established by measuring (bake in — do not re-derive)

Measured in a headless render (Inter font; see caveat) of the no-keys `MainWindow`:

- **The QueuePanel is a fixed 280 px wide** — `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/MainWindow.axaml`:
  `<controls:QueuePanel Width="280" …/>`. **This width is intentional — do NOT widen the panel
  to "solve" the clipping** (same constraint as the sibling task).
- The gate `Border` has `Padding="14"`, so the inner content is ~250 px wide (the horizontal
  `StackPanel` arranged to **250 px**).
- The **"Get a free token →"** button arranges to **146 px**; with `Spacing="8"` that leaves only
  ~96 px for the hint, but the hint's unconstrained desired width is **172 px**. Its right edge
  wants **341 px** inside a 280 px panel → ~**61 px (≈35%)** of the hint is cut by the panel's
  outer `<Border Classes="panel" ClipToBounds="True">`. Avalonia `TextBlock` does not wrap or
  trim by default, so a horizontal `StackPanel` next to a button overflows and is clipped.
- **Caveat (font metrics):** the screenshot tool and the headless test harness both use the
  embedded **Inter** font (`WithInterFont()`), while the real desktop uses the system default
  font, so absolute pixel widths differ slightly between environments. The ~76 px shortfall is
  large enough that the hint clips under any reasonable UI font at this fixed 280 px width.

## What to do

At the panel's fixed **280 px** width, make the **entire** gate hint visible — robust to longer /
localized text, not tuned to today's exact string. No behaviour change to the button (keep its
`Command`, the `huggingface.co/settings/tokens` URL, and the `Get a free token →` label).

Recommended (Plan/Implement may refine): **stop laying the hint out horizontally beside the
button.** Put the **"or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar"** `TextBlock` on its own line below the
button (the gate's outer container is already a vertical `StackPanel`) and give it
`TextWrapping="Wrap"` so it uses the full ~250 px content width and wraps instead of clipping.
This mirrors the accepted fix in `init-panel-buttons-labels-clipped` (stack vertically rather than
cram side-by-side at 280 px).

Rejected alternatives (do not re-litigate): widening the QueuePanel (280 px is intentional);
shrinking font/padding to keep button + hint on one line (fragile, still clips on longer/localized
strings); trimming the hint with an ellipsis (hides the actionable instruction).

## Tests (TDD — write the failing test first)

Headless-UI, in the style of `tests/VisualRelay.Tests/InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests.cs` /
`ConfigInitEmptyStateUiTests.cs`. Force the no-keys gate on: build the VM with an
`EnvironmentAccessor` seeded so `HF_TOKEN` is absent (see `KeySetupPanelUiTests` /
`SettingsTestHelpers.SeedUserEnv(repo, "")`), `await LoadInitialAsync()` so `_keyStatesLoaded`
flips and `ShowHfGate == true`, then `Show()` the `MainWindow`.

- Resolve the hint `TextBlock` (e.g. by its text starting with "or open Settings") and assert it is
  **not clipped** at the fixed 280 px panel width — e.g. its arranged `Bounds.Width` ≥ its
  unconstrained `DesiredSize.Width`, **or** that it wraps (its arranged right edge, translated into
  the `QueuePanel`, is ≤ the panel width). This fails on today's horizontal layout (right edge
  ~341 px > 280 px) and passes once the hint stacks/wraps.
- Keep `KeySetupPanelUiTests`, `ConfigInitEmptyStateUiTests`, and `InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests`
  green.

## Out of scope

- The init card's button labels (already fixed in `init-panel-buttons-labels-clipped`).
- The top-bar **FOLDER** path ellipsis (intentional `TextTrimming`, not a bug).
- The SettingsPanel key-setup screen — it renders fully and scrolls (a `ScrollViewer`) at short
  heights; no clipping there.

## Done when

- At the default window size and the fixed 280 px QueuePanel width, the **whole** HF-gate hint
  ("or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar") is visible — nothing clipped — and robust to longer labels.
- The "Get a free token →" button is unchanged (label, command, URL) and still works.
- A headless-UI test asserts the hint no longer clips (fails before, passes after); the existing
  settings/init UI tests stay green.
- A re-screenshot / headless render of the no-keys `MainWindow` confirms the banner no longer clips.
- `./visual-relay check` is green. Conventional Commit.


## Manifest
(not set yet)

## Prior stages
## Stage 1 - Ideate

{
  "summary": "The HF-gate banner hint 'or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar' clips because it's laid out horizontally beside the 'Get a free token →' button in a fixed 280px QueuePanel — the combined width (326px) exceeds the ~250px content area. The fix is to move the TextBlock to its own line below the button with TextWrapping='Wrap', matching the sibling fix in init-panel-buttons-labels-clipped. Option A (stack vertically) is simplest and most robust; Option B (inline wrapping with MaxWidth binding) is fragile; Option C (Grid/DockPanel) is functionally similar to A but less idiomatic.",
  "options": [
    "Option A: Move the hint TextBlock to its own line below the button in the enclosing vertical StackPanel, add TextWrapping='Wrap' — mirrors the accepted init-panel fix, no new bindings, robust to longer text.",
    "Option B: Keep horizontal layout but add TextWrapping='Wrap' to the hint and bind MaxWidth to subtract button+spacing from the parent Border's ActualWidth — fragile, requires a converter, and can still look cramped.",
    "Option C: Replace the horizontal StackPanel with a Grid/DockPanel (auto/* columns) and add TextWrapping='Wrap' to the hint — preserves horizontal adjacency in theory but at 280px still wraps, and is more verbose than Option A."
  ]
}



End your reply with a single fenced ```json block, nothing after it, matching: { "findings": string, "constraints": string[] }

result.answer:
## Findings

### Source files
1. **`src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/QueuePanel.axaml`** (lines 199-228) — Contains the HF-gate banner `Border` at `Grid.Row="2"`. The culprit is the nested `StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"` (lines 215-226) that places the "Get a free token →" button and the hint `TextBlock` side by side. The outer container is a `StackPanel` (vertical) with `Spacing="8"`.

2. **`src/VisualRelay.App/Views/MainWindow.axaml`** (line 51) — The `QueuePanel` is fixed at `Width="280"`. This is enforced by the task description — do not widen.

3. **`src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.Keys.cs`** — `ShowHfGate` (line 82) is `_keyStatesLoaded && !IsHuggingFaceConfigured`. `_keyStatesLoaded` is set to `true` in `RefreshKeyStatesAsync()` (line 169). `IsHuggingFaceConfigured` is set from `HF_TOKEN` presence (line 164).

### Test infrastructure
4. **`tests/VisualRelay.Tests/InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests.cs`** — The model test. Uses `[Collection("Headless")]`, `[AvaloniaFact]`, creates a `TestRepository`, builds `MainWindowViewModel` with `RootPath`, calls `LoadInitialAsync()`, shows a `MainWindow` at 1440×900, resolves the `QueuePanel` via `GetVisualDescendants().OfType<QueuePanel>().Single()`, then finds controls and asserts layout bounds.

5. **`tests/VisualRelay.Tests/HfGateBannerVisibilityTests.cs`** — Existing visibility-only tests for `ShowHfGate`. Uses `DictionaryEnvironmentAccessor` and `SeedUserEnv()` to set `HF_TOKEN` presence/absence. Already tests the gate visibility logic but does NOT test the layout (no window rendering).

6. **`tests/VisualRelay.Tests/KeySetupPanelUiTests.cs`** — Shows pattern for seeding env: `SettingsTestHelpers.SeedUserEnv(_env, repo, "")` (empty string = no HF_TOKEN) plus `EnsureNoUserEnv()`.

7. **`tests/VisualRelay.Tests/SettingsTestHelpers.cs`** — Contains `SeedUserEnv()` helper that writes a `.env` file and sets `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` in the fake accessor.

### Layout mechanics
8. The gate `Border` has `Padding="14"`, yielding ~252 px content width inside the 280 px panel.
9. The button arranges to ~146 px + 8 px spacing + 172 px hint = 326 px combined, but only ~252 px available → ~61 px clipped.
10. The outer `Border Classes="panel"` has `ClipToBounds="True"` (line 8), which is what actually cuts the overflow.

### Recommended fix (from task + ideation)
- Move the hint `TextBlock` out of the horizontal `StackPanel` and onto its own `StackPanel` row below the button.
- Add `TextWrapping="Wrap"` so it uses the full ~252 px content width.
- Keep the button unchanged (label, command, URL).

### Existing test
- `HfGateBannerVisibilityTests.cs` already tests the visibility logic but not the UI layout. We should either add to this file or create a new companion file (e.g., `HfGateBannerLayoutTests.cs`) to add the headless-UI layout assertion.

```json
{
  "findings": "The HF-gate banner at lines 199-228 of QueuePanel.axaml uses a horizontal StackPanel (lines 215-226) that places the 'Get a free token →' button next to the 'or open Settings ⚙ in the top bar' TextBlock. At the fixed 280px QueuePanel width with 14px padding, the combined width (~326px) exceeds available content width (~252px), causing the outer Border's ClipToBounds to cut ~61px (35%) of the hint. The fix is to move the TextBlock to its own StackPanel row below the button with TextWrapping='Wrap', mirroring the sibling init-panel-buttons-labels-clipped fix. A new headless-UI test is needed (in the style of InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests) that renders MainWindow with no HF_TOKEN, resolves the hint TextBlock, and asserts its Bounds fit within the 280px QueuePanel width. Existing HfGateBannerVisibilityTests cover VM logic only. Test infrastructure: AvaloniaFact + Collection(\"Headless\"), TestRepository, SettingsTestHelpers.SeedUserEnv(repo, \"\") to clear HF_TOKEN, LoadInitialAsync() to flip _keyStatesLoaded, then Show() the MainWindow.",
  "constraints": [
    "QueuePanel Width=280 is intentional — do NOT widen it.",
    "Button must remain unchanged (label='Get a free token →', Command=OpenGetKeyUrlCommand, CommandParameter=https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens).",
    "Existing tests (HfGateBannerVisibilityTests, KeySetupPanelUiTests, ConfigInitEmptyStateUiTests, InitPanelButtonsLayoutTests) must stay green.",
    "The hint TextBlock must be robust to longer/localized text — TextWrapping='Wrap' is required.",
    "The outer Border has ClipToBounds='True' which clips overflow — the fix must ensure the hint never overflows.",
    "Test must fail BEFORE the layout fix (i.e., written first / asserted with current broken layout) and pass after.",
    "Conventional commit required. ./visual-relay check must pass."
  ]
}
```
